Package com.github.scribejava.oidc

Interface OidcKeyCache

  • All Known Implementing Classes:
    DefaultOidcKeyCache
    public interface OidcKeyCache
    Interface for OIDC JWKS (JSON Web Key Set) key caching.

    • Method Summary

      All Methods Instance Methods Abstract Methods 
      Modifier and Type Method Description
      void clear()
      Clears all cached keys.
      OidcKey get​(String kid)
      Retrieves an OIDC key from the cache by its Key ID (kid).
      void putAll​(Map<String,​OidcKey> keys)
      Caches all the given OIDC keys.

    • Method Detail

      • get

        OidcKey get​(String kid)
        Retrieves an OIDC key from the cache by its Key ID (kid).
        Parameters:
        kid - the key identifier
        Returns:
        the corresponding OidcKey, or null if not found in the cache

      • putAll

        void putAll​(Map<String,​OidcKey> keys)
        Caches all the given OIDC keys.
        Parameters:
        keys - a map of Key ID to OidcKey to be cached

      • clear

        void clear()
        Clears all cached keys.
